text.title: react-hooks Decision Tree
text.summary: Per-slice ownership tree. Run once for every state slice the feature owns.

decision-tree.root-question: Where does this slice's value come from?

branch.conclusion: Route to TanStack Query / SWR. Do NOT replicate with useState + useEffect; that produces stale-cache bugs.
Route to React Hook Form. Local useState is acceptable only for a single-field input.
Route to existing Zustand/Jotai/Redux store. Do not introduce a new Context layer when an external store already exists.

branch.question: How many fields does the slice carry and are their transitions coupled?

branch.conclusion: Use useState. Use the functional updater whenever the next state depends on the previous.
Use useReducer. Define an Action discriminated union and a pure reducer; effects dispatch into it.
Use useRef. Mutations don't trigger re-renders; cleanup is the owner's responsibility in the effect.

text.example: slice=query q-state-origin -> 'component-local' q-shape -> 'single-primitive-or-pair' => conclusion r4-functional-updater: useState with functional updater for setQuery.
